task_completion.description: Open the ToothGrowth dataset in Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application is open and the ToothGrowth dataset is visible in the spreadsheet view, showing columns like 'len', 'supp', and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: Set up the Linear Regression with correct dependent variable, factor, and covariate
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Linear Regression settings panel, 'len' is placed in the 'Dependent Variable' box, 'supp' is in the 'Factors' box, and 'dose' is in the 'Covariates' box.

task_completion.description: Include the interaction term in the model builder
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Model Builder' section of the regression settings, the 'Model Terms' list includes 'dose', 'supp', and the interaction term 'dose * supp' (or 'dose:supp').

task_completion.description: Select required analysis options (R, R², Adjusted R², Estimates, Confidence intervals)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results tables on the right display R, R², Adjusted R² in the Model Fit Measures table, and Estimates with Confidence Intervals (Lower/Upper bounds) in the Model Coefficients table.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal output confirms that the file 'ToothGrowth_Moderated.omv' is saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory.

task_completion.description: Document the regression results in a text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'moderated_regression_results.txt' with the correct statistical values: R-squared (~0.73), F-statistic (~50.36), overall p-value (<0.001), interaction estimate (~3.90), and interaction p-value (~0.025).

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi graphical interface rather than running Python or R scripts in a terminal to get the results.

integrity.description: The documented results match the Jamovi output
integrity.visual_evidence: The statistical values typed into the text file match the values displayed in the Jamovi results panel, indicating they were derived from the actual analysis.

integrity.description: The text file and Jamovi project are actually saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file and .omv file are visibly saved to the disk (e.g., seen in a file manager or terminal list), not just typed in an unsaved editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct statistical results for the moderated linear regression (len ~ dose * supp) are: R-squared: ~0.7296 (tolerance 0.02), F-statistic: ~50.36 (tolerance 2.0), overall p-value: < 0.001, interaction term (dose:supp) estimate: ~3.904 (tolerance 0.5), and interaction term p-value: ~0.0246 (tolerance 0.01). The VLM should verify that the text file contains values within these tolerances.
